section.title: In-class Activities
section.p: Most class sessions, we will have worksheets or other activities to engage with the current topics from the textbook. These may involve writing things down and receiving my feedback to help develop your math writing skills. I will try to record your successful completion of these in class. If you need time outside of class (including if you miss class) you will be able to scan work and post it in D2L to earn that credit.

paragraphs.title: Late Submissions
paragraphs.p: Ideally we complete these in class and you immediately have all of the credit you need for these. But if you need to turn your work in separately in D2L, you should consider the next Sunday night to be the due date. That is how you can keep yourself at pace for the course, and not risk failing the course. I will still accept these for full credit up to two weeks later.
